name: Prefab Building Manufacturer
description:
SAMAN is a prefab building manufacturer that fabricates every structure at its own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida — not a trader, not a reseller, and not a contractor buying your building in from someone else. When you order a prefab building from us, the steel frame, wall panels, and roof are cut, welded, and assembled in our facility, then delivered to your site anywhere in India.

That single fact — who actually builds the structure — is what most buyers are really checking when they search for a manufacturer. This page answers it directly, then points you to the right next step.

Is SAMAN the actual manufacturer, or a reseller?

Yes — SAMAN manufactures its prefab buildings in-house. Each structure is fabricated at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida, not bought from a third-party fabricator. Because there is no trading intermediary in between, you deal directly with the team that designs, cuts, and welds the building you take delivery of.

Inside the plant — prefab building frames and panels fabricated in-house, not bought from a third party.

This matters for three reasons: the price you pay carries no reseller margin, any defect is ours to fix rather than passed down a supply chain, and changes to your size or layout are made on the shop floor instead of negotiated through a middleman.

Prefab building manufacturer, product range, or turnkey builder — which do you need?

"Prefab building" covers more than one need, so before you enquire, it helps to know which page actually serves you:

  • You want to see the range of buildings we make — offices, commercial blocks, institutional and industrial structures, with multi-room layouts. That product catalogue lives on a separate page; browse our commercial and industrial prefab building range there.
  • You need design, supply and erection as a managed service — your site, our crew, one contract. That is handled by our turnkey design-and-erection service, not this page.
  • You want to source the building as a prefabricated building manufacturer would supply it — fabricated, delivered, and erected by your own team. That is exactly what this page is for.

A larger multi-bay prefab building — the broader range buyers can specify with the manufacturer.

If you are not sure which fits, send your requirement and we will route it correctly.

What we manufacture in-house — materials, configuration, capacity

Every SAMAN prefab building is built on a structural steel frame with PUF (puff) panel walls and roof — the same insulated panel system used across our pre-engineered range. Nothing is off-the-shelf: we manufacture to your size and layout, from a single-room site office building up to multi-bay commercial structures.

A completed prefab building configured as a working commercial unit on an industrial estate.

Our two plants give us the capacity to run volume orders and dispatch Pan-India without depending on outside fabricators. A standard configured unit measures 60′ × 26′ × 19′, but the brief is yours to set — span, height, door and window positions, and panel specification are all confirmed before fabrication starts. This is the in-house fabrication and custom-layout control that a factory building manufacturer with its own plant can offer and a trading reseller cannot.

Manufacturer-direct pricing and delivery timeline

A standard 60′ × 26′ × 19′ prefab building in steel and PUF panel is priced at ₹16,25,000, inclusive of taxes — quoted direct from the manufacturer, with no reseller markup added on top. Cost moves mainly with overall size, panel thickness, and the number of openings; a smaller site building costs less, a larger or taller structure more.

Manufacturer-direct dispatch — components loaded at the plant for Pan-India delivery.

Lead time runs from your confirmed brief to dispatch, and we deliver across India from whichever plant is closest to your site. Sharing your location at enquiry stage lets us confirm both the timeline and the delivery cost up front, rather than after you have committed.

Ordering from SAMAN as your prefab building manufacturer

The process is straightforward: share your size and intended use, we design and quote, you confirm, and we fabricate and deliver. To see how this product sits within our wider steel-building line, visit the full pre-engineered building category; if your specification leans toward a bare structural shell rather than a finished building, our engineered steel building options cover that route.

The finished prefab building in daily use as an office on a manufacturing campus.

Ready to start? Call or WhatsApp us with your size and location for a manufacturer-direct quote.

📞 Bangalore: +91 80886 85440  |  💬 WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
📞 Delhi NCR: +91 87960 39938  |  💬 WhatsApp +91 97089 89937

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between a prefab building and a pre-engineered building?
A pre-engineered building is the engineered steel structural system itself, designed to span and load. A prefab building is the broader factory-built structure — frame plus panels, finished and configured for use. SAMAN manufactures both; this page is for buyers searching by the broader "prefab" term.

Can SAMAN manufacture a prefab building to my custom size and layout?
Yes. Size, height, internal layout, and opening positions are set from your brief before fabrication. The 60′ × 26′ × 19′ unit is a standard reference, not a fixed product.

What does a prefab building cost direct from the manufacturer?
A standard steel-and-PUF-panel unit is ₹16,25,000 incl. taxes. Final price depends on size, panel specification, and openings — quoted direct, with no intermediary margin.

Do you only manufacture and supply, or also erect on site?
We manufacture and supply as standard. Full on-site erection is available as a managed service through our PEB constructions team if you need design, supply, and installation under one contract.
short_description:
Factory-built prefab building — 60×26×19 ft, fabricated in-house, no reseller markup.

Frame / Panel

Bangalore · Delhi NCR
